_publications._publicationTitle: Multiplatform molecular profiling uncovers two subgroups of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors with distinct therapeutic vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: Again, PTCH1-knockout in ipNF06.2A cells induced activation of the SHH pathway and a significant increase in cellular proliferation and migration
details: PTCH1-knockout in ipNF06.2A cells induced activation of the SHH pathway and significant increase in cellular proliferation and migration
